decisions.summary: Use separate getAvailableEditors RPC instead of extending DashboardSnapshot. Avoids coupling read-model to PanOpen service and keeps schema backward-compatible.
Drop upstream PR to T3Code (external repo, out of scope) and keyboard shortcut (marginal value). CLI command is in scope.
Skipped AgentList right-click context menu — no existing context menu infrastructure on agent list. Primary integration points (InspectorPanel + AgentInfoSection) cover all visible workspace paths.

Used Schema.String for OpenInEditorInput.cwd instead of Schema.trimmed/nonEmptyString — those APIs not available in this Effect version and server-side validation is unnecessary since spawn ENOENT handles missing paths.

hazards.summary: No sync FS calls in server-reachable code — PAN-70 compliance.
hazards.mitigation: Cache resolveAvailableEditors at service construction time. Let spawn ENOENT surface for missing commands.

hazards.summary: UI verification must use Node 22 built dist server, not Bun.
hazards.mitigation: Run npm run build before browser verification.

resumePoint.description: Implementation complete. All 6 beads closed. Typecheck, lint pass. 12 PAN-966-specific tests pass. 5 pre-existing test failures unrelated to this issue.

beadsMapping.workspace-i247: B1: editor contracts — EDITORS, EditorId, OpenInEditorInput, RPC definitions
beadsMapping.workspace-b34f: B2: PanOpen server service — resolveAvailableEditors, launchDetached, tests
beadsMapping.workspace-r0ub: B3: wire RPC handlers in ws-rpc.ts + PanOpenLive in server.ts
beadsMapping.workspace-q1a4: B5: integrate picker into InspectorPanel + AgentInfoSection

sessionHistory.note: Implemented full Open-in-Editor feature: contracts (EDITORS, EditorId, OpenInEditorInput, 2 RPCs), PanOpen server service with async editor detection and detached launch, ws-rpc + server.ts wiring, frontend editorPreferences + PanOpenInPicker split-button component, InspectorPanel + AgentInfoSection integration, pan open CLI command. 6 commits, 6 beads, all closed.
